probes.name: athlete-guardian-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms athlete_guardians table + partial unique indexes exist.

probes.name: athlete-guardian-primary-invariant-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index (athlete_id, is_primary=true, deleted_at IS NULL) exists. Without it, concurrent primary promotions could both succeed.

probes.name: athlete-guardian-primary-invariant-clean
probes.description: Runs the same query as ReconcilePrimaryGuardianInvariantJob. Any finding is a P1.

probes.name: athlete-guardian-orphan-minor-detection
probes.description: Detects minor athletes with zero active guardians. Fires P1 — safeguarding-critical.

probes.name: athlete-guardian-verification-backlog
probes.description: Detects guardians stuck in pending state for > config.athlete_guardian.verification.pending_ttl_days. Elevated indicates auto-verify job stalled OR HR queue backlog on Enterprise tenants.

probes.name: athlete-guardian-communications-bounce-rate
probes.description: Percentage of guardians with can_receive_communications=false due to auto-disable via bounce threshold. Elevated indicates email deliverability degradation.
